title: Create: Truly Modular
description: Allow Truly Modular's Scuba Helmet to work with Create back tanks.
body:
# Overview
_This mod was made on commission by [almightytallestred](https://www.curseforge.com/members/almightytallestred/projects)_

This mod simply allows the scuba helmet from [Truly Modular: Armory](https://modrinth.com/mod/truly-modular-armory) to work with the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod's back tanks. Visiblity is not affected using the Armory scuba helmets.

## Requirements
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Truly Modular](https://modrinth.com/mod/modular-item-api)
- [Truly Modular: Armory](https://modrinth.com/mod/truly-modular-armory)
